title: pelargonium roseum
intro: Pelargonium roseum, also known as rose-scented geranium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the geraniaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium roseum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and relieving symptoms of menopause, as well as providing a natural remedy for colds and flu. Pelargonium roseum can be prepared as herbal teas, essential oils, and capsules, which can be consumed for its medicinal benefits.
